item.title: UK Plans To Jail Tech CEOs Who Refuse To Spy On Every Phone
item.description:
UK Plans To Jail Tech CEOs Who Refuse To Spy On Every Phone

Privacy advocates warn the "child safety" framing masks a broader drive to turn personal phones into mandatory surveillance endpoints, with criminal penalties aimed at any executive who resists.

Reclaim The Net, an organization dedicated to countering online censorship and digital surveillan
item.content:encoded:
UK Plans To Jail Tech CEOs Who Refuse To Spy On Every Phone

Privacy advocates warn the "child safety" framing masks a broader drive to turn personal phones into mandatory surveillance endpoints, with criminal penalties aimed at any executive who resists.

Reclaim The Net, an organization dedicated to countering online censorship and digital surveillan
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.description: Why Thermodynamics Rules Future Orbital Data Centers
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Bessent Pulls Trigger On Using Frozen Funds To Reimburse Gulf Allies: 'Iran Will Pay'
item.description:
Bessent Pulls Trigger On Using Frozen Funds To Reimburse Gulf Allies: 'Iran Will Pay'

US Treasury Secretary Bessent announced on X Thursday morning that Washington is moving forward on a plan to compensate America's Gulf regional allies for damage sustained during Iranian counterattacks on their energy and civic infrastructure.

He made clear that any damage to Gulf allies would be paid for with frozen Iranian funds, which Tehran leadership has long blasted as blatan
item.content:encoded:
Bessent Pulls Trigger On Using Frozen Funds To Reimburse Gulf Allies: 'Iran Will Pay'

US Treasury Secretary Bessent announced on X Thursday morning that Washington is moving forward on a plan to compensate America's Gulf regional allies for damage sustained during Iranian counterattacks on their energy and civic infrastructure.

He made clear that any damage to Gulf allies would be paid for with frozen Iranian funds, which Tehran leadership has long blasted as blatan
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Strategy (MSTR) CEO Says Bitcoin Sale Was About Market 'Inoculation', Not A Retreat

item.content:encoded: Strategy (MSTR) CEO Says Bitcoin Sale Was About Market 'Inoculation', Not A Retreat
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Poland Won't Stand In The Way Of Ukraine's EU Bid, Despite Relations Hitting Rock Bottom
item.description:
Poland Won't Stand In The Way Of Ukraine's EU Bid, Despite Relations Hitting Rock Bottom

Poland will not obstruct the commencement of negotiations regarding Ukraine's accession to the European Union, but Warsaw remains firmly opposed to granting any preferential treatment to Kyiv, Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk has told journalists.

Relations between the two Eastern European allies have reached crisis-mode of late, after President Volodymyr Zelen
item.content:encoded:
Poland Won't Stand In The Way Of Ukraine's EU Bid, Despite Relations Hitting Rock Bottom

Poland will not obstruct the commencement of negotiations regarding Ukraine's accession to the European Union, but Warsaw remains firmly opposed to granting any preferential treatment to Kyiv, Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk has told journalists.

Relations between the two Eastern European allies have reached crisis-mode of late, after President Volodymyr Zelen
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Bill Gates Tells Congress That Epstein Exploited Knowledge Of His Adultery
item.description:
Bill Gates Tells Congress That Epstein Exploited Knowledge Of His Adultery

Microsoft founder and mega-billionaire philanthropist Bill Gates told Congress that Jeffrey Epstein exploited knowledge of Gates' multiple marital infidelities. Gates insists, however, that he committed no crimes and that the women he had adulterous sexual relations with were not associated with Epstein. Nonetheless, Gates' highlighting of Epstein's leveraging of Gates' sexual secre
item.content:encoded:
Bill Gates Tells Congress That Epstein Exploited Knowledge Of His Adultery

Microsoft founder and mega-billionaire philanthropist Bill Gates told Congress that Jeffrey Epstein exploited knowledge of Gates' multiple marital infidelities. Gates insists, however, that he committed no crimes and that the women he had adulterous sexual relations with were not associated with Epstein. Nonetheless, Gates' highlighting of Epstein's leveraging of Gates' sexual secre
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: [Federal Register] Removing Regulations Related to Trade Adjustment Assistance for Firms
item.description: By this rule, EDA removes its regulations pertaining to trade adjustment assistance for firms, effective September 30, 2028. The removal of these regulations is ultimately necessary to reflect both the lapse of the underlying statutory authorization as well as the inactive status of this assistance program, and to ensure that EDA's body of regulations remains accurate and up-to-date. This action is intended to eliminate outdated regulatory language, and thereby reduce the possibility of confusio
item.content:encoded: By this rule, EDA removes its regulations pertaining to trade adjustment assistance for firms, effective September 30, 2028. The removal of these regulations is ultimately necessary to reflect both the lapse of the underlying statutory authorization as well as the inactive status of this assistance program, and to ensure that EDA's body of regulations remains accurate and up-to-date. This action is intended to eliminate outdated regulatory language, and thereby reduce the possibility of confusio
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Merkel Receives The First European Order Of Merit Award, Repeats Call For Crackdown On Free Speech
item.description:
Merkel Receives The First European Order Of Merit Award, Repeats Call For Crackdown On Free Speech

the organization’s highest award. The headliner was Angela Merkel, former Federal Chancellor of Germany, who indeed personifies the European Union for both her fans and her critics. For many years, some of us have criticized Merkel as one of the leading forces behind European censorship efforts that have eviscerated the “
item.content:encoded:
Merkel Receives The First European Order Of Merit Award, Repeats Call For Crackdown On Free Speech

the organization’s highest award. The headliner was Angela Merkel, former Federal Chancellor of Germany, who indeed personifies the European Union for both her fans and her critics. For many years, some of us have criticized Merkel as one of the leading forces behind European censorship efforts that have eviscerated the “
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Recently read this article on Reddit by Actonic : 233 data protection laws active globally. All share one principle. None have clear guidance for LLM context windows.
item.description:
The scale here maps directly to a problem I've been building around for the past several months.

The author's observation that the laws rhyme is accurate; lawful basis, data subject rights, data minimisation, breach notification. The same core, 233 times over. What that means practically for anyone building AI products is that the lowest common denominator across all
item.content:encoded:
The scale here maps directly to a problem I've been building around for the past several months.

The author's observation that the laws rhyme is accurate; lawful basis, data subject rights, data minimisation, breach notification. The same core, 233 times over. What that means practically for anyone building AI products is that the lowest common denominator across all
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: EU Plans €100 Billion Project To Bring African Sunlight To Power Europe's Electric Revolution
item.description:
EU Plans €100 Billion Project To Bring African Sunlight To Power Europe's Electric Revolution

The European Union, which has been starved for cheap energy since the start of the Ukraine war, is betting that the future of its energy system lies under the North African sun. On Tuesday, the European Commission pledged €5 billion of EU money to renewables projects in North Africa and the Middle East, which could feed electricity back into Europe’s grid,
item.content:encoded:
EU Plans €100 Billion Project To Bring African Sunlight To Power Europe's Electric Revolution

The European Union, which has been starved for cheap energy since the start of the Ukraine war, is betting that the future of its energy system lies under the North African sun. On Tuesday, the European Commission pledged €5 billion of EU money to renewables projects in North Africa and the Middle East, which could feed electricity back into Europe’s grid,
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Daily Crypto Discussion - June 10, 2026 (GMT+0)
item.description:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: FIFA scams are a reminder that privacy tools are also security tools
item.description:
With all the reports of fake World Cup ticket sites and spoofed hotel booking pages, I've noticed a lot of people still think privacy tools are only about hiding browsing activity.

Realistically, ad blocking, tracker blocking, and malware filtering often stop users from reaching malicious traffic right away.
Most phishing attacks don't start with someone typing
item.content:encoded:
With all the reports of fake World Cup ticket sites and spoofed hotel booking pages, I've noticed a lot of people still think privacy tools are only about hiding browsing activity.

Realistically, ad blocking, tracker blocking, and malware filtering often stop users from reaching malicious traffic right away.
Most phishing attacks don't start with someone typing
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Looking for privacy guide by u/not***
item.description:
I think his username was something like notzycher. The site was hosted on GitHub. There was a Reddit post where he said it was more advanced than most guides. I wanted to reread it but lost the tab after I uninstalled all my previous browsers.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I think his username was something like notzycher. The site was hosted on GitHub. There was a Reddit post where he said it was more advanced than most guides. I wanted to reread it but lost the tab after I uninstalled all my previous browsers.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Was banned within 5 minutes of posting this comment to worldnews
item.description:
Reddit is 100% taken over by Israel.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
Reddit is 100% taken over by Israel.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: CBP Chief Says Border Wall Should Be Finished By Late 2027
item.description:
CBP Chief Says Border Wall Should Be Finished By Late 2027

Scott told an audience in Washington that the “primary border wall ... will be done by the end of 2027,” adding that there are a “couple of gaps.” The wall will stretch from San Diego to Texas near the Gulf of Mexico.

“The only places we’re not building a border wall is places where we’ve made a c
item.content:encoded:
CBP Chief Says Border Wall Should Be Finished By Late 2027

Scott told an audience in Washington that the “primary border wall ... will be done by the end of 2027,” adding that there are a “couple of gaps.” The wall will stretch from San Diego to Texas near the Gulf of Mexico.

“The only places we’re not building a border wall is places where we’ve made a c
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: As Spy Law Nears Expiration, Lawmakers Mull Short-Term Renewal
item.description:
As Spy Law Nears Expiration, Lawmakers Mull Short-Term Renewal

As the clock ticks down, lawmakers are contemplating Trump’s latest proposal: another short-term extension of the authority while the president searches for a permanent nominee other than his chosen acting director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte.

Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (
item.content:encoded:
As Spy Law Nears Expiration, Lawmakers Mull Short-Term Renewal

As the clock ticks down, lawmakers are contemplating Trump’s latest proposal: another short-term extension of the authority while the president searches for a permanent nominee other than his chosen acting director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte.

Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: From FOMO To Oh No! Koreans Face Massive Forced Liquidations As AI Bubble Bursts
item.description:
From FOMO To Oh No! Koreans Face Massive Forced Liquidations As AI Bubble Bursts

And the concentration was extremely clear with 'new lows' dominating even as KOSPI hit record-er and record-er highs...
item.content:encoded:
From FOMO To Oh No! Koreans Face Massive Forced Liquidations As AI Bubble Bursts

And the concentration was extremely clear with 'new lows' dominating even as KOSPI hit record-er and record-er highs...
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: RFK Jr. Responds To "Explosion" in Tick-Borne, WEF-Touted Alpha-Gal Syndrome
item.description:
RFK Jr. Responds To "Explosion" in Tick-Borne, WEF-Touted Alpha-Gal Syndrome

Authored By Ben Bartee at Secretary Kennedy tells me HHS is addressing the “explosion of Alpha Gal,” a tick-borne disease that leaves people with a life-long allergy to red meat.

Efforts include searching for a cure and reducing tick populations.

In the quoted tweet, you’ll see NYU “bioethics” professor…
item.content:encoded:
RFK Jr. Responds To "Explosion" in Tick-Borne, WEF-Touted Alpha-Gal Syndrome

Authored By Ben Bartee at Secretary Kennedy tells me HHS is addressing the “explosion of Alpha Gal,” a tick-borne disease that leaves people with a life-long allergy to red meat.

Efforts include searching for a cure and reducing tick populations.

In the quoted tweet, you’ll see NYU “bioethics” professor…
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Enshittification Merch That Actually Fights Enshittification
item.description:
Enshittification isn't just a sweary word to describe the accelerating decay of the online platforms, apps, and services that we rely on.

It's a framework for understanding the structural incentives that make tech companies enemies of their own users over time—the surveillance business model, the erosion of privacy, the monopoly power that eliminates alternatives, the regulatory capture that prevents accountabil
item.content:encoded:
Enshittification isn't just a sweary word to describe the accelerating decay of the online platforms, apps, and services that we rely on.

It's a framework for understanding the structural incentives that make tech companies enemies of their own users over time—the surveillance business model, the erosion of privacy, the monopoly power that eliminates alternatives, the regulatory capture that prevents accountabil
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time
item.description:
Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time

China's PLA military has long been known to intimidate and threaten the self-ruled island of Taiwan, mainly with large military exercises which sometime encircle it partially or completely, or else with a heavy naval boat presence in the Strait of Hormuz.

Taiwan's military often reacts by scrambling its own fighter jets to closely monitor the PLA maneuvers - seen as a natural defe
item.content:encoded:
Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time

China's PLA military has long been known to intimidate and threaten the self-ruled island of Taiwan, mainly with large military exercises which sometime encircle it partially or completely, or else with a heavy naval boat presence in the Strait of Hormuz.

Taiwan's military often reacts by scrambling its own fighter jets to closely monitor the PLA maneuvers - seen as a natural defe
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: If you'll buy this then I have oceanfront property in Nebraska that I would like to sell you.
item.description:
Rule 10 Submission Statement: Bill Clinton was not impeached for having an affair or getting a BJ. He was impeached for directly lying to the American people. Yet, Donald Trump not only lies to the American people, daily, his lies are becoming outrageous enough they're not even in the realm of possibility.

The oil prices are not
item.content:encoded:
Rule 10 Submission Statement: Bill Clinton was not impeached for having an affair or getting a BJ. He was impeached for directly lying to the American people. Yet, Donald Trump not only lies to the American people, daily, his lies are becoming outrageous enough they're not even in the realm of possibility.

The oil prices are not
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"
item.description:
Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"

Summary

  • Trump says "secret mission" has reopened the Strait
  • Trump says "Will be attacking Iran hard again today"
  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now
item.content:encoded:
Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"

Summary

  • Trump says "secret mission" has reopened the Strait
  • Trump says "Will be attacking Iran hard again today"
  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz
item.description:
Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz

Confirming our reported from both a week ago (see "directed our Great U.S. Military to execute a secret mission to support Oil Tankers and other Commercial Ships through the Strait of Hormuz." Of course, the mission wasn't that secret if we discussed how the this effort has resulted
item.content:encoded:
Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz

Confirming our reported from both a week ago (see "directed our Great U.S. Military to execute a secret mission to support Oil Tankers and other Commercial Ships through the Strait of Hormuz." Of course, the mission wasn't that secret if we discussed how the this effort has resulted
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: I hate being forced to download shitty apps with no alternative
item.description:
I am currently pursuing weight loss surgery. Like many in the US, I'm in a region where one medical group runs every hospital. I'd have to drive an hour and a half to reach another provider.

I am be forced to install 2 different shitty data harvesting apps if I want to proceed. If you don't know, you need tons of classes and pre-requisites before insurance will cover
item.content:encoded:
I am currently pursuing weight loss surgery. Like many in the US, I'm in a region where one medical group runs every hospital. I'd have to drive an hour and a half to reach another provider.

I am be forced to install 2 different shitty data harvesting apps if I want to proceed. If you don't know, you need tons of classes and pre-requisites before insurance will cover
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Tech: House GOP leaders ready kids’ bills
item.description:
has begun discussions about getting a marquee kids’ digital package from the Energy and Commerce Committee to the floor soon, potentially within weeks, according to a senior GOP aide."

The marquee digital package being the KIDS ACT bill package.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
has begun discussions about getting a marquee kids’ digital package from the Energy and Commerce Committee to the floor soon, potentially within weeks, according to a senior GOP aide."

The marquee digital package being the KIDS ACT bill package.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Punitive home demolition is a policy Israel has been using since 1945 to expand territory and fuel extremism...
item.description: This practice is carried out under Regulation 119 of the Defense (Emergency) Regulations, a law originally enacted in 1945 by the British Mandate authorities to suppress revolts, which Israel retained and continues to use exclusively against Palestinians in the West Bank and East Jerusalem, leading critics to characterize it as an eleme
item.content:encoded: This practice is carried out under Regulation 119 of the Defense (Emergency) Regulations, a law originally enacted in 1945 by the British Mandate authorities to suppress revolts, which Israel retained and continues to use exclusively against Palestinians in the West Bank and East Jerusalem, leading critics to characterize it as an eleme
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'
item.description:
Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'

Summary

  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now "will have to pay the price".
  • Tehran claims prior night attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan as fulfilment of its previously vowed 'retaliation'
item.content:encoded:
Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'

Summary

  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now "will have to pay the price".
  • Tehran claims prior night attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan as fulfilment of its previously vowed 'retaliation'
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez
